cola = ["job1", "job2", "job3"]
while cola:
    job = cola.pop(0)
    if job == "job2":
        print("PAUSE")
        break
    print(job)
print("rest", cola)

exercises.answer:
buf = ["a", "b", "END"]
i = 0
out = []
while True:
    if i > 10:
        raise RuntimeError("guardrail")
    item = buf[i]
    i += 1
    if item == "END":
        break
    out.append(item)
print(out)

exercises.answer:
def tasa_reject(sts):
    n_total = len(sts)
    if n_total == 0:
        return None
    n_reject = sum(1 for s in sts if s == "reject")
    return n_reject / n_total

sts = ["accept", "reject", "accept"]
print(round(tasa_reject(sts), 4))
print(tasa_reject([]))

print(tasa_reject([]))

exercises.answer:
rows = [
    {"id": "C1", "status": "accept"},
    {"id": "C2", "status": "reject"},
    {"id": "C3", "status": "accept"},
    {"id": "C4", "status": "reject"},
]
by = {r["id"]: r["status"] for r in rows}
rejects = [r["id"] for r in rows if r["status"] == "reject"]
tasa = len(rejects) / len(rows) if rows else None
print("by", by)
print("reject", rejects, tasa)

exercises.answer:
vals = [2, -1, 3]
s = 0
print("i | val | s")
for i, val in enumerate(vals):
    if val > 0:
        s += val
    print(i, val, s)
print("final", s)

exercises.answer:
statuses = ["reject", "accept", "reject", "reject", "accept"]
# O(n²) ingenuo de pares reject-reject (evitado):
# n_pairs = 0
# for i,a in enumerate(statuses):
#     for j,b in enumerate(statuses):
#         if i < j and a == b == "reject":
#             n_pairs += 1
n_reject = 0
for st in statuses:
    if st == "reject":
        n_reject += 1
n_total = len(statuses)
tasa = n_reject / n_total if n_total else None
print(n_reject, tasa)
print("Nota: la tasa de reject del gate es O(n) con contador; no hace falta doble for de pares.")
exercises.code:
statuses = ["reject", "accept", "reject", "reject", "accept"]
# O(n²) ingenuo de pares reject-reject (evitado):
# n_pairs = 0
# for i,a in enumerate(statuses):
#     for j,b in enumerate(statuses):
#         if i < j and a == b == "reject":
#             n_pairs += 1
n_reject = 0
for st in statuses:
    if st == "reject":
        n_reject += 1
n_total = len(statuses)
tasa = n_reject / n_total if n_total else None
print(n_reject, tasa)
print("Nota: la tasa de reject del gate es O(n) con contador; no hace falta doble for de pares.")

selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Descarto [1,2,3] y [0..3]: el packet insiste en stop exclusivo de range → [0,1,2].

selfcheck.chosen_text: Empareja solo (1,10) y (2,20); el 3 se pierde en silencio
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: No lanza ValueError por defecto: solo zip(..., strict=True) o zip_strict validan longitudes.
Solo n_accept o n_review distorsionan la tasa del gate; el packet fija n_total procesados.

selfcheck.chosen_text: Salta al siguiente ciclo del bucle
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: break termina el bucle; continue solo salta el resto del cuerpo de esta iteración.
O(n) es un solo for; el anidado completo es cuadrático según la teoría de costo.
